concepts.name: Center of mass distance relation
concepts.description: For two masses on a line, distances from the center of mass satisfy $m_1 r_1 = m_2 r_2$.

concepts.name: Tangential speed from angular speed
concepts.description: In circular motion, tangential speed is $v = \omega r$.

concepts.name: Momentum in the center-of-mass frame
concepts.description: Total momentum is zero in the center-of-mass frame, so $p_{\text{total}} = 0$.

concepts.name: Angular momentum of one particle
concepts.description: Magnitude is $L = r_\perp p = mvr$ for perpendicular velocity.

concepts.name: Total angular momentum of a system
concepts.description: Total angular momentum is the sum of contributions from all bodies, so $L_{\text{total}} = \sum_i L_i$.

concepts.name: Binary system modeling
concepts.description: Combine center-of-mass geometry, circular motion, momentum, and angular momentum consistently.

error_types.name: Ignored the reference frame
error_types.description: The student did not apply the center-of-mass frame condition when evaluating total momentum.
hint_levels: What reference frame does the problem specify?
In the center-of-mass frame, what is the total momentum of the whole system?
That frame forces the vector sum of all momenta to be zero.

error_types.name: Reversed center-of-mass relation
error_types.description: The student swapped which mass should be farther from the center of mass.
hint_levels: Which mass should sit closer to the center of mass: the heavier one or the lighter one?
Use $m_1 r_1 = m_2 r_2$ before substituting numbers.
For masses $m$ and $5m$, the lighter mass must be five times farther from the center of mass.

error_types.name: Incorrect use of $v = \omega r$
error_types.description: The student did not connect angular speed and radius correctly.
hint_levels: For uniform circular motion, how is tangential speed related to angular speed?
Each body has its own radius from the center of mass, so each speed is $\omega$ times that radius.
Compute $v_1 = \omega r_1$ and $v_2 = \omega r_2$ before finding momentum or angular momentum.

error_types.name: Missing body contribution
error_types.description: The student only accounted for one body when summing total angular momentum.
hint_levels: How many masses are orbiting in the system?
Write one angular momentum term for each body around the same origin.
The total angular momentum is $L_1 + L_2$, not just one term.

error_types.name: Momentum direction mistake
error_types.description: The student treated opposite momenta as if they pointed in the same direction.
hint_levels: Are the two linear momenta in the same direction or opposite directions in the center-of-mass frame?
Total momentum is a vector sum, so sign or direction matters before taking magnitudes.
The two bodies carry equal-magnitude opposite momenta in the center-of-mass frame.

error_types.name: Algebra or arithmetic error
error_types.description: The student used the right structure but simplified or computed incorrectly.
hint_levels: Your setup may be right. Recheck the substitution and simplification carefully.
Keep common factors such as $m$, $d$, and $\omega$ symbolic until the last step.
After combining terms, the coefficient should simplify cleanly without changing the physical structure.

error_types.name: Partial system model
error_types.description: The student answered only one requested quantity or failed to combine the momentum and angular momentum parts.
hint_levels: Does the problem ask for one quantity or more than one?
Separate the task into geometry, momentum, and angular momentum before combining the results.
State total momentum first, then compute total angular momentum using both bodies.

error_types.name: 只有記到動量
error_types.description: 學生混淆了動量 (p=mv) 與角動量 (L=mvr)。
hint_levels: 動量跟角動量有一字之差，差別在哪裡？
角動量的定義是位置向量與動量向量的外積。

error_types.name: 速度與角速度混淆
error_types.description: 學生將切線速度的表達式誤認為角動量。
hint_levels: $\omega r$ 的單位是速度 (m/s)，角動量的單位應該包含質量、長度與時間。

error_types.name: 誤解質心坐標系動量
error_types.description: 學生可能受動量公式 $P = mv$ 影響，錯誤地認為質量比是動量比。
hint_levels: 提示 1: 想想看「質心坐標系」定義下的總動量應該是多少？
提示 2: 既然總動量是 0，代表兩者的動量向量之和必須為零。

error_types.name: 反比誤用
error_types.description: 學生錯誤地將反比性質應用於動量大小，而非速度。
hint_levels: 提示: 速度 $v$ 的確跟質量成反比，但動量 $P = mv$ 呢？

error_types.name: 不熟悉質心坐標系
error_types.description: 學生對質心坐標系的不熟悉，導致他以為需要軌道幾何資訊。
hint_levels: 提示: 質心坐標系有一個強大的特性，跟軌道半徑無關。

error_types.name: 公式記錯
error_types.description: 如果學生選 A，他可能記反了公式，或者是把 $v = \omega r$ 以為是 $v = \omega / r$。
hint_levels: 想想看，在同樣的轉動時間內，外圈的人跑的路徑比較長還是內圈的人？
切線速度的公式是 $v = \omega r$，當 $\omega$ 相同時，$v$ 與 $r$ 是成正比還是反比？

error_types.name: 平方誤解
error_types.description: 如果學生選 C 或 D，他可能把「加速度」或「角速度平方」的關係帶進來了，或者是把 $r$ 給平方了（像是在帶萬有引力公式）。
hint_levels: 這裡只問速度 (v)，不是加速度 (a)，不需要把半徑平方。

error_types.name: 動量與角動量混淆
error_types.description: 學生只記到了「動量 (p=mv)」，卻忘記了「角」動量需要考慮到距離 (r)。
hint_levels: 動量跟角動量有一字之差，差別在哪裡？
角動量的定義是位置向量與動量向量的外積。

error_types.name: 角速度混淆
error_types.description: 學生可能跟角速度的公式搞混了，或者只是在亂湊單位。

error_types.name: 速度與角動量混淆
error_types.description: 選 D 的話，學生雖然想到了圓周運動，但 \(\omega r\) 其實是速度 \(v\)，不是角動量。
hint_levels: \(\omega r\) 的單位是速度 (m/s)，角動量的單位應該包含質量、長度與時間。

questions.statement: Two masses $m$ and $5m$ are separated by distance $d$. In the center-of-mass frame, what are their distances from the center of mass?
A mass moves in a circle of radius $r$ around the center of mass with angular speed $\omega$. Which expression gives its speed?
In the center-of-mass frame of any isolated two-body system, what is the total momentum of the system?

options.text: Equal to $mv$ of the lighter body
Equal to the sum of momentum magnitudes
Cannot be determined without the radii

questions.statement: A particle of mass $m$ moves perpendicular to the radius vector at speed $v$, at distance $r$ from the origin. What is the magnitude of its angular momentum about the origin?
In a binary system, each body contributes angular momentum about the center of mass. Which expression matches the total angular momentum?

options.text: $L_{\text{total}} = L_1 - L_2$ because the bodies are on opposite sides

questions.statement: For masses $m$ and $5m$ separated by $d$ in circular motion about their center of mass, what are the speeds of the two masses?
Binary system: masses $m$ and $5m$ are separated by $d$ and rotate with angular speed $\omega$ about their center of mass. What is the total momentum in the center-of-mass frame?
Two bodies orbit the center of mass in opposite positions. Their momenta are equal in magnitude. How should those momenta combine for total momentum?

options.text: They add because magnitudes are positive
They cancel because the vectors are opposite
They cancel only if the radii are equal

questions.statement: A student computes the angular momentum of only the lighter mass in a binary system and stops. What is the diagnostic issue?

Full problem: masses $m$ and $5m$ are separated by $d$ and rotate with angular speed $\omega$. In the center-of-mass frame, what is the correct pair $(\text{total momentum}, \text{total angular momentum})$?
在一個互繞運行的雙星系統中，恆星 A 的質量為 M，恆星 B 的質量為 3M。請問在「質心坐標系 (Center-of-Mass Frame)」中，這兩顆恆星的動量大小 (Magnitude) 的比例為何？

options.text: 無法確定，因為沒有給予軌道半徑

questions.statement: 兩個星體 A 與 B 以角速度 $\omega$ 繞質心公轉。若 A 距離質心 $R_A$，B 距離質心 $R_B$，且 $R_A = 2 R_B$。請問兩星體的切線速度大小比例 $v_A : v_B$ 為何？
一個質量為 m 的質點，以速度 v 在半徑為 r 的圓周上運動。請問它對圓心的角動量量值為何？
